message:
fix(http/h2): reject zero-increment WINDOW_UPDATE in send path (RFC 7540 §6.9)

send_connection_window_update and send_stream_window_update accepted
increment=0, which violates RFC 7540 §6.9 ("A change of 0... MUST be
treated as... an error"). Add early-return validation to both methods
with FlowControlError, plus 4 regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
